heroSubtitle: APEX AI is your personal fitness coach that watches you work out, predicts your progress, and answers every question — all powered by AI, built around you.

coach.title: Your Personal AI Trainer
coach.desc: Chat with your coach anytime. Ask about your diet, workouts, or goals — it knows your body and gives advice made just for you.

camera.title: Live Workout Camera
camera.desc: Turn on your camera during a workout and get instant rep counting and form tips to help you move better.

predictions.title: Smart Body Predictions
predictions.desc: Tell us your stats and we predict your daily calorie needs, ideal weight, and fitness level — updated as you grow.

progress.title: Monitor Your Progress
progress.desc: See your weight trend, workout history, and streaks in simple charts. Know exactly what's working and what to focus on next.

footer: © {{year}} APEX AI · Graduation Project · Production-Grade AI Fitness Platform
pricingHeroSubtitle: Every plan includes the full AI stack. Upgrade when you need more.
pricingFootnote: All plans include: cookie-session auth · SQLite/PostgreSQL · Full API · Self-hostable
